INVOKE.COMMENT: left pad the counter with 0 to make it a 7 char length
Concat the acc # to the counter variable and map it to tempDoc

MAP.COMMENT: Fix the amount so there is no decimal place

INVOKE.COMMENT: left pad the amount with 0 to make it a 10 char length
left pad the entry count with 0 to make it a 6 char length
left pad the amount with 0 to make it a 10 char length
left pad the total amount with 0 to make it a 12 char length
left pad the entry count with 0 to make it a 6 char length

MAP.COMMENT: Get Total Number of Lines in File
get number of lines left over
Subtract count from 10 to get the number of filler records to be appended at the end
Subtract 1 from count as it is used as a counter for the repeat and fillerList which start with 0 rather than starting with 1
make a filler string out of filler list

INVOKE.COMMENT: left pad the total amount with 0 to make it a 12 char length

record.value: one of the following options: ls, get, put

record.name: type
record.value: one of the following options: ls, get, put

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Do not fail the trxn if the logging to DB fails
